description: milestone-driver Claude-side gates (per .claude/milestone-driver.json). force-subagent: blocks main-thread edits to the repo's source/test globs so app/test code is authored only by the dispatched implementer subagent. no-pr-to-protected: blocks `gh pr create --base <protectedBranch>`. Requires PowerShell 7+ (pwsh); bash-only consumers can repoint the commands at the matching hooks/*.sh.
